Get computer training

October 1995
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

Multiple journalism organizations are offering computer training bootcamps and workshops for journalists in fall 2024 and spring 2025, with programs focusing on computer-assisted reporting at MIT, Medill School, and NICAR.

Get computer training:

Society for Environmental Journalists, Oct. 26-29, Massachusetts Institute for Technology, Boston. The Medill School of Journalism, four-day computer-assisted reporting bootcamp, Dec. 7-10. Medill's Washington, D.C., campus. NICAR Bootcamps, week-long intensive training seminars, Jan. 7-12, and March 10-15, Columbia, Mo.

These dates are open to all journalists. For more information, call NICAR, (314) 882-0684, or send e-mail to nicar@muccmail.missouri.edu.
